## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build DomanMahjongAI.sln` passes
- [ ] `dotnet test DomanMahjongAI.sln` passes

- [ ] If this bumps the plugin version, both `DomanMahjongAI.csproj` and `repo/repo.json` are in sync
